creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
I have FreeBSD hades 13.3-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE-p1 GENERIC amd64
kernel and  source tag on /usr/src (release/13.3.0) and I have problem this: 
I tried load kernel module but linker_load_file: work/stage/boot/modules/vboxdrv.ko - unsupported file type

pid 90196 (VirtualBoxVM), jid 0, uid 1001: exited on signal 6
pid 91990 (VirtualBoxVM), jid 0, uid 1001: exited on signal 6
kldload: unexpected relocation type 42, symbol index 1397
link_elf_obj: symbol __stack_chk_guard undefined
linker_load_file: work/stage/boot/modules/vboxdrv.ko - unsupported file type
